name: Thal-Quartzleap
personality: The spell-capped rabbit turns its four-pointed gaze to one purpose: it has never once closed a tab mid-compile. Its luminous form is visible from across the office, especially at 3am during the deploy. Thal-Quartzleap color-codes its branches and refuses to merge without a passing lint check, but its ears twitch at the sound of a failing build.
